name: Chicken Salad Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the Mandarin orange segments.
2. In a large bowl, combine mayo or salad dressing, lime juice, salt, and nutmeg.
3. Add the remaining ingredients; mix well.
4. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves.
6. Refrigerate any leftovers.
